task:
/home/user/Documents/cloud.ply is an ASCII PLY with 800 points offset above the Z=0 plane; /home/user/Documents/plane.obj is a triangulated planar square mesh on Z=0.

Compute per-point cloud-to-mesh (C2M) distances from cloud.ply (compared) to plane.obj (reference mesh) with default settings, attaching the resulting per-point distances as a scalar field on cloud.ply. Export the cloud with its scalar field as an ASCII PLY at /home/user/Documents/cloud_c2m.ply. The exported file must include an extra scalar (distance) property per vertex beyond x,y,z, and the 800-point count must be preserved.

verification.description: Scalar field property present beyond x,y,z
